criteria_results.criterion: Migration 023 creates tool_sections table with all required columns, RLS via can_access_workspace(), update_updated_at trigger, workspace_id index
criteria_results.evidence: Read supabase/migrations/023_tool_sections.sql: CREATE TABLE tool_sections with id UUID PK, workspace_id UUID FK, name TEXT, description TEXT, position_x NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, position_y NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, width NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 600, height NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 400, created_at/updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. RLS enabled with 4 policies using can_access_workspace(). BEFORE UPDATE trigger tool_sections_updated_at. INDEX idx_tool_sections_workspace on workspace_id.

criteria_results.criterion: Same migration ALTERs tools table: ADD COLUMN position_x NUMERIC DEFAULT 0, position_y NUMERIC DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK(active|considering|cancelled)
criteria_results.evidence: Migration 023 lines 47-51: ALTER TABLE tools ADD COLUMN position_x NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN position_y NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active', 'considering', 'cancelled')). All three columns present with correct types and constraints.

criteria_results.criterion: New ToolSection interface in types/database.ts matching all columns. Tool interface updated with position_x, position_y, status fields.
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1 notes: 'ToolStatus type and ToolSection interface added to database.ts; Tool interface updated with position_x, position_y, status.' TypeScript typecheck passes (0 errors per BUILD_RESULT verification).

criteria_results.criterion: New API route POST /api/v1/tool-sections (create) + GET by workspace_id. Follows successResponse/errorResponse envelope. Requires workspace_id.
criteria_results.evidence: Read src/app/api/v1/tool-sections/route.ts: GET validates workspace_id query param (400 if missing), queries tool_sections table ordered by created_at, returns successResponse(toolSections). POST validates workspace_id in body, inserts row, calls logActivity fire-and-forget, returns successResponse(toolSection, 201). Both use errorResponse for auth/validation/DB errors.

criteria_results.criterion: New API route PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/tool-sections/[id]. PATCH supports name, description, position_x, position_y, width, height. DELETE with 0-row detection → 404.
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1 notes: '[id] PATCH+DELETE route follows sections/[id]/route.ts pattern with PGRST116 detection returning 404.' TypeScript clean confirms implementation is type-correct.

criteria_results.criterion: Existing tools API routes (POST + PATCH) updated to accept position_x, position_y, status in editable fields
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1: 'tools API routes updated: POST accepts position_x, position_y, status; PATCH EDITABLE_FIELDS extended with position_x, position_y, status (with status validation).' Files tools/route.ts and tools/[id]/route.ts modified with net +10/-9 and +15/-4 line deltas respectively.

criteria_results.criterion: Client wrappers in client.ts: fetchToolSections, createToolSection, updateToolSection, deleteToolSection. All use apiFetch<T>() pattern.
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1: 'Client wrappers added: fetchToolSections, createToolSection, updateToolSection, deleteToolSection. createTool and updateTool signatures extended for new Tool fields.' client.ts modified +38/-2 lines.
BUILD_RESULT_1 verification: typecheck status=pass, errors=0, output='npx tsc --noEmit: no output (clean)'.

criteria_results.criterion: gap-analysis-view.tsx not_configured block no longer contains the word 'redeploy'
criteria_results.evidence: Read gap-analysis-view.tsx lines 313-330: not_configured block text is 'AI features require configuration. Contact your workspace administrator to enable AI analysis, or if you manage your own deployment, add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to your environment variables.' The word 'redeploy' does not appear anywhere in the file.

criteria_results.criterion: Replacement text is SaaS-appropriate (similar to IMP-064 fix in ai-analysis-view.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: Text matches the SaaS pattern: leads with user-facing 'Contact your workspace administrator', includes self-hosted fallback 'if you manage your own deployment, add OPENROUTER_API_KEY'. Consistent with standard SaaS messaging for missing API key configuration.

criteria_results.criterion: ai-analysis-view.tsx 'Last run' date uses consistent format producing identical server/client output (toISOString().slice(0,10) for YYYY-MM-DD)
criteria_results.evidence: Read ai-analysis-view.tsx line 194: `new Date(lastAt).toISOString().slice(0, 10)`. Browser confirms rendering: AI Analysis page shows 'Last run 2026-03-04' — YYYY-MM-DD format, deterministic across locales.

criteria_results.criterion: No hydration mismatch warning in browser console for the AI analysis date
criteria_results.evidence: Mega listener injected and checked on /ai-analysis page: window.__testErrors=0, window.__testWarnings=0, no hydration-related messages. Browser page loaded cleanly.

bugs_found.description: GET /api/v1/improvement-ideas?workspace_id=... returns 500 Internal Server Error on every workspace page load. This endpoint is called from the workspace shell or a page component. The route likely references a non-existent DB table or column.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Log in. 2. Navigate to any workspace page (e.g., /gap-analysis, /ai-analysis). 3. Open Network tab — observe GET /api/v1/improvement-ideas returns 500.

improvements_found.observation: The 'Generate Summary' button is disabled with text 'Score steps to enable AI narrative' but there is no inline guidance directing users to where they can score steps. A new user would not know to go to the canvas and open a step's detail panel.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a small link or tooltip near the disabled state: 'Open a step on the canvas to set maturity scores' with a link to the canvas tab.

improvements_found.observation: Workspace card date shows '3/4/2026' (toLocaleDateString format) — this is the same locale-dependent issue that BUG-030 fixed on the ai-analysis page. The workspace list card still uses the unpatched pattern.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Apply the same toISOString().slice(0, 10) fix to the workspace creation date display in the workspace list card component.
